supportMessage.Name: Support the Developer
supportMessage.Hint: Click to select and copy the link

enableToggleBackground.Name: Enable Background Toggle
enableToggleBackground.Hint: Enables hotkey B to switch between Grid / No Grid backgrounds

lightDarkExpressions.Name: Light/Dark Expressions
lightDarkExpressions.Hint: Define pairs like "light/dark; day/night". Press N to toggle between them

hqLqExpressions.Name: HQ/LQ Expressions
hqLqExpressions.Hint: Define pairs like "LQ/HQ". Press , to toggle between them

customTogglePairs.Name: Custom Toggle Groups
customTogglePairs.Hint: Define groups like "roof/no roof; phase1/phase2/phase3". Use . to cycle forward and / to cycle backward

baseTile.Name: Set Base Tile
baseTile.Hint: Press M, then click two points to define a grid cell. Right-click to cancel

toggleBackground.Name: Toggle Grid Background
toggleBackground.Hint: Press B to switch between Grid and No Grid versions

toggleLightDark.Name: Toggle Light/Dark
toggleLightDark.Hint: Press N to cycle through light/dark variants

toggleHQ.Name: Toggle HQ/LQ
toggleHQ.Hint: Press , to cycle through quality variants

toggleCustom.Name: Toggle Custom Forward
toggleCustom.Hint: Press . to cycle forward through custom variants

toggleCustomReverse.Name: Toggle Custom Backward
toggleCustomReverse.Hint: Press / to cycle backward through custom variants
